detailed_results.description: Should describe Headless e-commerce platform for D2C brands in e-commerce
recalled_memories: ShopCore Commerce operates in the e-commerce industry. Key differentiator: Headless e-commerce platform for D2C brands. Competes by focusing on product quality and customer experience.
ShopCore Commerce's product development approach: customer-driven, iterative releases every 2 weeks, strong emphasis on reliability and security. The team values craftsmanship over speed.

Key ShopCore Commerce metrics: MRR growing 15% month-over-month, churn rate at 3.2% (down from 5.1%), NPS score of 67, team size grew from 8 to 12 in 6 months. Commerce Engine drives 60% of new signups.

ShopCore Commerce's strategy has evolved significantly. Started as a pure e-commerce tool, pivoted to platform play after seeing demand for integrations. Now building an ecosystem with APIs and partner integrations. Brandon Wu drove this shift after customer discovery calls in month 3.

ShopCore Commerce culture: remote-first, async communication preferred, weekly all-hands, monthly team retrospectives. Brandon Wu is very transparent about company finances and strategy with the whole team. No politics tolerance.
detailed_results.reasoning: The first memory contains the core definition of ShopCore Commerce as a headless e-commerce platform for D2C brands. While the other memories provide context, the initial memory is the most relevant and complete.
